business for over 40 years
Encouraged by the liberalisation, DTC has a long and established history in the mining industry.

luxury and comfort
We have a strong track record in delivering sustainable and quality community living across all our projects.

a better tomorrow
We are committed to making a difference in the lives of people and communities through our CSR initiatives.

About DTC Group

The DTC Group started with its humble beginnings in the mining industry. In a span of 40 years, we have managed to branch out in several other industries, most notably in real estate and infrastructure.

We are a family-owned conglomerate with a strong focus on sustainable growth and development. Our focus on social responsibility is evident in our long-term investment approach and the development projects we undertake.

We are a group built on the foundation of trust, quality, and excellence. Our businesses are always geared towards creating value for all our stakeholders.

Know More

Featured Project

Southern Heights

DTC’s Southern Heights is a world-class residential project located in South West Kolkata. The project spans an area of 20 acres with a total built-up area of approximately 3 Million Sq. Ft. It offers luxurious apartments with all modern amenities to take you to the ‘NEXT LEVEL LIVING’. The project is designed keeping in mind the needs of modern families. The project has already bagged 5 prestigious awards and has been awarded 5-Star Rating from CRISIL.

Featured Project

Southern Heights

DTC’s Southern Heights is a world-class residential project located in South West Kolkata. The project spans an area of 20 acres with a total built-up area of approximately 3 Million Sq. Ft. It offers luxurious apartments with all modern 

amenities to take you to the ‘NEXT LEVEL LIVING’. The project is designed keeping in mind the needs of modern families. The project has already bagged 5 prestigious awards and has been awarded 5-Star Rating from CRISIL.

Awards & Recognition

DTC has been felicitated with many awards and recognition over the years for our outstanding work in different industries.
